backend.changelog: ADR-019 Stage A -- source-cache freshness plumbing. Backend now persists 3DX cestamp (opaque change-event-stamp) and modified (US locale date) per BOM item and per drawing, so future Generate runs can detect stale local SW caches without an extra round-trip. No user-visible behavior change yet -- Stage B (CadBridge 1.8.45 close+reopen for stale items) and Stage C (frontend stale-set + Force Regenerate widened to global force-refresh) follow.

cadBridge.changelog: Fix swMode mis-detection on SOLIDWORKS Connector workstations that also have a bare SOLIDWORKS 3DEXPERIENCE R20YYx launcher-shim folder (CATSTART + SWXDesktopLauncher installed by the 3DX Connector add-in, no SLDWORKS.exe). Before 1.8.44 the agent flipped registry-confirmed connector mode to connected based on folder existence alone, and the launcher selector then picked SWXDesktopLauncher.exe -> SOLIDWORKS Design failed to launch. Application not found. Fix: override now requires a real SLDWORKS.exe on disk. Bonus: new FindSwClassicInstallRoot walks registry first (HKLM SolidWorks Setup + multi-version mirrors), then globs SOLIDWORKS Corp*/SOLIDWORKS/sldworks.exe so SW 2024+ year-in-Corp installs (Corp 2025, Corp 2026, ...) work without code changes, then legacy SolidWorks 20XX. No hardcoded years anywhere.
